opportunity.title: Jeriko – an AI agent that runs directly inside your OS
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: I've been wrestling with OS-level agent integration myself - the real challenge isn't the agent architecture but the sandboxing model. When agents need to access system resources, you either need deep privilege (security nightmare) or heavy isolation that kills performance. I've been exploring capability-based access control combined with formal verification of agent permissions - seems like Jeriko's approach might sidestep this?
actions.reasoning: This is directly about an AI agent framework for developer tooling that integrates at the OS level
